summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apixel Portfolio iteration 2 features. All new requirements successfully implemented and working correctly. Theme toggle positioned correctly, Store page updated with new copy and 6 templates with badges, Blog cards made compact, Admin login race condition fixed, and mobile responsiveness improved.
passed_tests: Backend health check and all API endpoints working (7/7 tests passed)
6 demo templates seeded in backend and displayed on Store page
Theme toggle button positioned to LEFT of 'Get Started' button in navbar
Store page shows updated copy: 'Skip the Struggle. Start Selling Today.'
Store page sub-heading mentions premium ready-to-launch store
Template cards display badges: 'Most Popular', 'Best Seller', 'Trending'
Template card buttons show 'View Details' text
Blog cards have compact 16/9 aspect ratio style matching store cards
Admin login works with admin@agency.com / Admin@123 credentials
Admin login redirects to /admin/dashboard successfully
Admin dashboard shows correct statistics (3 blogs, 4 services, 6 templates, 3 messages)
Admin panel mobile responsive with hamburger menu button
Mobile admin sidebar opens/closes correctly with all navigation items
Mobile navigation menu works on public pages
Template detail pages load correctly (/templates/agency-pro-digital-agency)
Mobile responsiveness working across all pages
Dark/Light mode toggle functionality working correctly
Theme preferences persist in localStorage
Contact form submission working
All navigation links functional on desktop and mobile
